    Method WithColor

    WithColor(PunctualLight, Vector3, float, float)

    Defines the light color, intensity and range for the current PunctualLight.

    Declaration
    public static PunctualLight WithColor(this PunctualLight light, Vector3 color, float intensity = 1, float range = Infinity)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    PunctualLight light

    This PunctualLight instance.
    Vector3 color

    RGB value for light's color in linear space.
    float intensity

    Brightness of light in. The units that this is defined in depend on the type of light. point and spot lights use luminous intensity in candela (lm/sr) while directional lights use illuminance in lux (lm/m2)
    float range

    Hint defining a distance cutoff at which the light's intensity may be considered to have reached zero. Supported only for point and spot lights. Must be > 0. When undefined, range is assumed to be infinite.
    Returns
    Type Description
    PunctualLight

    This PunctualLight instance.
